---
title: "Resume"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

<div style="max-width: 850px; margin: 0 auto;">

## Jessica Danielle Geiger

**Data Scientist | Drug Discovery & Machine Learning | Life Sciences**

<br>

<div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 30px;">

[Download Resume (PDF)](/static/resume/resume.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
&nbsp;&nbsp;
[Download Resume (DOCX)](/static/resume/resume.docx){.btn .btn-secondary}

</div>

<iframe src="/static/resume/resume.pdf" width="100%" height="900px"></iframe>

</div>
